THE OPPORTUNITY

A market with real demand, and no clear price tag.

Our own field study of 11 direct competitors found no consistent pricing logic across New Cairo's content studios.

11
Competitors studied directly through calls and site visits.
1,000–5,000
EGP per podcast hour — the market's price range.
400–1,718
EGP per reel including editing — the market's price range.
01

Audiences judge brand quality in seconds — lighting, audio, and space all speak before a word is said.

02

Every studio we surveyed prices differently — clients have no trusted reference point to compare against.

WHAT WE DO

Production solutions built around your goals.

Rather than simply renting a room, we help you produce content that strengthens credibility and elevates your brand.

Content Production

Reels, short-form video, personal branding, commercial storytelling.

Podcast Production

Multi-camera setup, premium audio, a dedicated recording space.

Commercial Production

Brand campaigns, corporate interviews, product launches.

Photography

Product, brand, portrait & campaign photography.

Every corner tells a story.

Three styled environments inside one studio — pick the mood that fits your content.

TRANSPARENT PRICING

Tiered pricing. No surprises.

Podcast packages, built from real cost analysis — every tier priced to be sustainable and fair.

Starter

1,800 EGP / hr
  • 1 camera + mic
  • Studio only, no crew
RECOMMENDED

Standard

3,200 EGP / hr
  • 2 cameras + core crew
  • Camera operator + sound engineer

Pro

5,000 EGP / hr
  • 3 cameras + full crew
  • Basic editing included

Reels: 5 clips ≈ EGP 640/reel · 10 ≈ EGP 550/reel · 15 ≈ EGP 500/reel · 20 ≈ EGP 450/reel — editing included, volume discount applies.
